items.title: Surface Disinfectant Company Evaluation Report 2025 | Reckitt Benckiser, Procter & Gamble, and 3M Lead Through Strategic Portfolio Focus, Market Expansion, and Operational Transformation
items.description: Explore the comprehensive Surface Disinfectant Companies Quadrant, an in-depth analysis of the global surface disinfectant market. This report evaluates 92 companies, with the top 11 recognized as quadrant leaders. Surface disinfectants, formulated with active agents like quats, alcohols, and hydrogen peroxide, combat bacteria, viruses, and fungi on non-living surfaces, crucial for infection control in diverse sectors from healthcare to public spaces. items.title: Reflecting On Household Products Stocks’ Q2 Earnings: Procter & Gamble (NYSE:PG)
items.description: The end of the earnings season is always a good time to take a step back and see who shined (and who not so much). Let’s take a look at how household products stocks fared in Q2, starting with Procter & Gamble (NYSE:PG).
